hero.badge: The Logistics Partner for Online Brands in Egypt
hero.headline:
Your Logistics Partner
to Grow Monthly Deliveries
hero.subheadline: Panther helps you boost profits through a complete logistics service built for the Egyptian market — daily pickup, live tracking, COD collection, and reports that show you exactly how your orders are moving.

about.title: Panther — Driving Commerce Growth in Egypt
about.description: Panther is more than a shipping company. We're a Logistics Partner for Online Brands that need to run their orders smarter — higher delivery rates, clearer tracking, faster collections, and a system that scales with you.
about.feature1Desc: We work with you to improve delivery success and reduce returned orders.
about.feature2Desc: See how your orders are moving from the first pickup all the way to collection.
about.feature3Desc: Your money comes back in an organized, clear way that helps you grow.
about.feature4Desc: Whether you're shipping 300 or 10,000 orders a month, our system grows with you.

services.title: Everything an Online Brand Needs... In One Place
services.subtitle: From the moment an order goes out to when your money comes back, Panther gives you all the logistics tools to run your brand more efficiently.
services.item0Desc: Our team picks up orders from you daily without disrupting your workflow.
services.item1Desc: Know exactly where your orders are at any time.
services.item2Desc: Upload thousands of orders at once in minutes.
services.item3Desc: Track your collections and know where your money is with ease.
services.item4Desc: A wide delivery network to help you reach more customers.
services.item5Desc: No surprise fees or hidden costs.

clients.title: Brands Growing with Panther
clients.subtitle: Online brands from various categories rely on Panther to run their orders, track shipments, and improve delivery rates.

partners.title: Built on Strong Partnerships
partners.subtitle: We work with trusted operational and strategic partners to deliver a seamless logistics experience.

branches.title: We Deliver Across Egypt
branches.subtitle: With branches in every major city and coverage in hundreds of areas, we make sure your customers can always receive their orders.

sellerHighlights.title: Your Operations Hub
sellerHighlights.subtitle: The Panther Express Seller Portal gives you everything you need to manage shipments, customers, and performance — all in one place.
sellerHighlights.feature0Desc: Submit new orders instantly from your dashboard.
sellerHighlights.feature1Desc: Upload 100s of orders from Excel in one click.
sellerHighlights.feature2Desc: Real-time status for every shipment in your account.
sellerHighlights.feature3Desc: Generate PDF labels for every order instantly.
sellerHighlights.feature4Desc: Save and reuse customer addresses. Ship repeat orders fast.
sellerHighlights.feature5Desc: View balances, COD remittances, and performance data anytime.

leadForm.title: Leave Your Info and Start Your Partnership with Panther in 24 Hours
leadForm.subtitle: Share your brand details and the Panther team will reach out with the best logistics plan for your business size.
leadForm.successMessage: We'll review your details and reach out within 24 hours to get you set up.
leadForm.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.
leadForm.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid Egyptian phone number
leadForm.volumeRequired: Please select your monthly shipment volume
leadForm.urlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (starting with https://)
